excerpt: Together AI partners with Pearl Research Labs to launch a discounted Pearl-powered inference endpoint for Gemma-4-31B-it-pearl, using Proof of Useful Work to turn AI workloads into crypto emissions.

title: Together AI and Pearl Research Labs Team Up to Reduce the Cost of AI Inference
